input: Ƒo nu tso ŋkeke aɖe si le Anyigba dzi si me nuheŋusẽ trɔna zi ɖeka gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo. Aleke amewo kple lãwo wɔa nui?
Wɔ ame aɖe si nye kalẽtɔ tsã gake eva zu ame vɔ̃ɖi le nugɔmemasemase wɔnublanui aɖe ta.
Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe si nye ame mamlɛtɔ le woƒe ƒomevi me si le xexe si yi ŋgɔ wo manɔmee me ŋu.
Wɔ ame aɖe si ƒe vɔvɔli gagbɔ agbe eye wòawɔ nu abe wo hati vɔ̃ɖitɔ ene.

Ŋlɔ e-mail be nàtsɔ akplɔ dɔbiagbalẽvi aɖe si nèwɔ kwasiɖa eve enye sia la ɖo. Ðe wò ɖetsɔleme si nèyi edzi le ɖe ɖoƒea ŋu gblɔ, da akpe na gbebiamelaa ɖe woƒe ɣeyiɣia ta, eye nàbia be woana nyatakaka yeyewo ye.
Ele be nàwɔ ɖoɖo ɖe kpekpe aɖe ŋu kple dɔwɔhati aɖe be míadzro dɔ aɖe ƒe ŋgɔyiyi me. Ŋlɔ e-mail bubutɔe nàbia ɣeyiɣi si sɔ na kpekpea eye nàgblɔ nyatakaka kpui aɖe.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na wò dɔdzikpɔla nàbia wò susu tso nyatakaka aɖe si nèɖo ɖa nyitsɔ laa ŋu. Ðe wò didi be yeana yeƒe dɔa nanyo ɖe edzi eye nàbia aɖaŋuɖoɖo tɔxɛwo.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na wò dɔdzikpɔla be nàɖe kuku le esi nèto dɔa ƒe ɣeyiɣi mamlɛa ŋu ta. Ðe nusitae nèhe ɖe megbe la me, eye nàgblɔ afɔɖeɖe siwo nàwɔ be nàkpɔ egbɔ be magadzɔ ake o.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na nudzrala aɖe si tsɔ nu siwo mesɔ o alo esiwo gblẽ la vɛ. Ðe nyaa me bubutɔe, gblɔe tsitotsito, eye nàbia be woagbugbɔ ga la ana ye alo aɖɔlii.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na asisiwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe teƒenɔla aɖe nàbia nya tso adzɔnu aɖe si nèdi be yeaƒle ƒe anyinɔnɔ kple eƒe nɔnɔmewo ŋu.
Ède dzesii be woxɔ ga si mesɔ o ɖe wò ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe fetu dzi. Ŋlɔ e-mail na fexexedɔwɔƒea nàtsɔ aɖe nyaa me eye nàbia be woaɖɔe ɖo.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na asisi vevi aɖe nàda akpe na wo ɖe woƒe asitsatsa si yi edzi ta, eye nàna woanya nu tso dodoɖeŋgɔ alo nu tɔxɛ aɖe si woatsɔ ana wo ŋu.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na dɔwɔƒe aɖe ƒe asisiwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe be nàkpɔ nuteƒekpɔkpɔ gbegblẽ aɖe si nèkpɔ le woƒe dɔwɔƒea gbɔ. Ðe kuxia me eye nàɖo aɖaŋu le alesi nàdi be woakpɔ egbɔe ŋu.
Ŋlɔ e-mail aɖe be nàbia be woatrɔ nusi nèƒle le Internet dzi alo aɖɔlii. Ŋlɔ wò nudɔdɔ ƒe xexlẽdzesi kple susu si ta nètrɔe vɛ.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na xɔ̃wò aɖe si mèƒo nu kplii o ɣeyiɣi aɖee nye esia. Lé wo ɖe nusiwo le dzɔdzɔm le wò agbe me ŋu eye nàbia wo be aleke wole.
Ŋlɔ e-mail tsɔ da akpe na ƒometɔ alo xɔlɔ̃ aɖe ɖe nunana aɖe si wona wò ta. Gblɔ nusita nèkpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe nunana la ŋu kple alesi nèɖoe be yeazãe ŋu tẽ.
Kpa e-mail si womewɔ le ɖoɖo nu o si akpe xɔ̃wòwo be woava kplɔ̃ɖoƒe aɖe si nèle wɔwɔm. Ŋlɔ ŋkekea, gaƒoƒoa, teƒea, kple wɔna tɔxɛ ɖesiaɖe ŋuti nyatakakawo ɖe eme.
Ŋlɔ e-mail tsɔ do dzidzɔ na xɔ̃wò alo dɔwɔhati aɖe ɖe nusi nèwɔ nyitsɔ laa ta. Gblɔ wò dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ ɖe wo ta eye nàgblɔ dzideƒonyawo.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na xɔ̃wò vevi aɖe alo wò ƒometɔ aɖe nàgblɔ nya dodzidzɔnamewo. Gblɔ nyatakakaawo tsitotsito kple alesi nèle sesem le ɖokuiwò me tso eŋu na wo.
Ŋlɔ e-mail ɖe yunivɛsiti aɖe ƒe amewo xɔxɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe be nàbia nyatakaka tso ɖoɖo aɖe koŋ ŋu. Bia nu tso dɔbiagbalẽvi xɔxɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa, ɣeyiɣi mamlɛawo, kple bubuawo ŋu.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na nufialagã tsãtɔ aɖe nàbia tso wo si be woaŋlɔ kafukafugbalẽ na wò. Gblɔ ɖoƒea ŋuti nyatakakawo tsitotsito eye nàgblɔ be yeana nyatakaka bubuwo.
Ŋlɔ e-mail le se nu na dziɖuɖumegã aɖe si ƒo nu tso nutoa me nya aɖe si ŋu nètsi dzi ɖo ŋu. Gblɔ nusiwo ŋu nètsi dzi ɖo, gblɔ nyateƒenya siwo ɖo kpe edzi, eye nàdo egbɔkpɔnu siwo nàte ŋu awɔ.

Ðeko nèdze dɔ yeye aɖe gɔme teti koe nye ema eye nèdi be yeaɖe ye ɖokui afia yeƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔwo. Ŋlɔ e-mail si woɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nu atsɔ aɖe ɖokuiwò afia eye nàɖe dzidzɔ si le asiwò ɖe dɔwɔwɔ ɖekae ŋu afia.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na dɔtɔ tsãtɔ aɖe si abia be yeazã wo abe dɔbiagbalẽvi yeye aɖe si dzi woanɔ te ɖo akpɔe ene. Bia mɔ tso wo gbɔ bubutɔe eye nàda akpe na wo ɖe woƒe kpekpeɖeŋu ta.
Ŋlɔ e-mail fafɛ aɖe na amesi ate ŋu ava zu wò asisi tsɔ ɖe wò dɔwɔƒea fia eye nàtsɔ wò dɔwo ana. Te gbe ɖe wò ŋutete veviwo dzi eye nàɖe alesi nàte ŋu akpe ɖe woƒe dɔwɔƒea ŋui me.
Kpa asitsatsa ƒe e-mail si me woaɖe gbeƒã adzɔnu yeye aɖe ƒe dodo. De adzɔnua ƒe nɔnɔmewo, viɖe siwo le eŋu, kple dodoɖeŋgɔ alo asiɖeɖe le eŋu tɔxɛ ɖesiaɖe ŋu tsitotsito.
Ŋlɔ e-mail si akplɔe ɖo na amesi ate ŋu ava zu wò asisi si ɖe ɖetsɔleme fia ɖe wò adzɔnu ŋu. Ðo ŋku viɖe siwo le eme dzi na wo eye nàgblɔ be yeaɖo nyabiase ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Ŋlɔ e-mail si ɖo kpe ame yeye aɖe si ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe wò dɔwɔƒea ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽa dzi. Akpe na wo be wowɔ nudɔdɔ, gblɔ nusi woakpɔ mɔ na na wo, eye nàde yɔyɔ be woawɔ nu ɖe eme.
Ŋlɔ nudzadzra ƒe e-mail na asisi aɖe si li xoxo si tsɔa nusiwo do ƒome kplii siwo ŋu woate ŋu atsɔ ɖe le la nam le nusiwo woƒle va yi ta. Te gbe ɖe nusita atike siawo kpena ɖe woƒe nuƒle ŋu dzi.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na wò nufialagã atsɔ abia be woadidi dɔdasi aɖe ɖe edzi. Ðe wò nɔnɔmea me eye nàgblɔ ɣeyiɣi si sɔ na ɣeyiɣi si nàte ŋu awu dɔa nu.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na wò sukuhati siwo le ɖoɖo wɔm ɖe ƒuƒoƒo ƒe dɔ aɖe ŋu. De dɔwo asi na wò, ɖo ɣeyiɣi mamlɛawo, eye nàdo kpekpeɣi aɖe ɖa be míadzro ŋgɔyiyi me.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na nufialagã aɖe nàbia nya tso numekuku ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔ siwo ate ŋu asu asiwò ŋu. Te gbe ɖe nusiwo me nètsɔ ɖe le dzi eye nàɖe nusita nàdi be yeawɔ dɔ kpli wo me.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na wò nufialagã atsɔ aɖe kuku be yeda le klass aɖe me le nɔnɔme siwo mèkpɔ mɔ na o ta. Bia ne nya aɖe li si wòle be nàlé ɖe asi hã.
Ŋlɔ e-mail na nufialagã alo aɖaŋuɖola tsãtɔ aɖe be nàbia aɖaŋuɖoɖo tso dɔ ŋu. Ðe nɔnɔme si me nèle fifia me kpuie eye nàbia mɔfiame le alesi nàwɔ ayi ŋgɔe ŋu.
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be Internet dzi nusɔsrɔ̃ wɔa dɔ wu nusɔsrɔ̃ tso blema ke, gake ame bubuwo ʋlia nya be sukuxɔ me nusɔsrɔ̃ gakpɔtɔ le vevie ŋutɔ. Dzro nukpɔsusu eveawo siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be ele be woakpɔ nutomekuxiwo gbɔ le xexeame katã, gake ame bubuwo ya susui be ele be woakpɔ wo gbɔ le nutoa me. Dzro nukpɔsusu evea siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be dɔwɔɖui kple agbenɔnɔ ƒe dadasɔ sesẽ egbea wu tsã. Afikae nèlɔ̃ ɖe nya sia dzi alo mèlɔ̃ ɖe edzi o?
Le dukɔ geɖe me la, amewo ƒe kpekpeme le mamã dedie nu le dzidzim ɖe edzi, evɔ lãmesẽ kple kamedede dzi le ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ. Nukawoe gbɔ kuxi sia tso kple egbɔkpɔnu siwo ate ŋu anɔ anyi?
Ame aɖewo ʋlia nya be lãwo dodokpɔ hena atikewɔwɔ ŋuti numekuku hiã, evɔ ame bubuwo ya xɔe se be ele be woaxe mɔ ɖe enu. Dzro nukpɔsusu eveawo siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Le dukɔ geɖe me la, sɔhɛwo le agbagba dzem be yewoakpɔ dɔ. Nukawo gbɔe nya sia tso, eye egbɔkpɔnu kawoe nàte ŋu ado ɖa?
Lolo akpa va le kuxi gã aɖe zum le dukɔ geɖe me. Nukawo gbɔe nya sia tso, eye afɔɖeɖe kawoe woate ŋu awɔ atsɔ akpɔ egbɔ?
Le du gã geɖe me la, ɖiƒoƒo ya kple tsi nye nya vevi aɖe. Nukawo gbɔe kuxi siawo tsona, eye afɔɖeɖe kawoe woate ŋu awɔ be nɔnɔmea nanyo ɖe edzi?
Digitál-mɔ̃ɖaŋununya veviwo mele ame tsitsi geɖe si haɖe le egbexexea me o. Nukawoe nye susu siwo tae wowɔ esia ɖo, eye nukae woate ŋu awɔ be dijitaal agbalẽsɔsrɔ̃ nanyo ɖe edzi?
Le dugã geɖe me la, aƒemanɔamesi le dzidzim ɖe edzi. Nukawo gbɔe dzidziɖedzi sia tso, eye nukae woate ŋu awɔ atsɔ aɖe kuxia dzi akpɔtɔ?
Yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ le ŋusẽ kpɔm ɖe míaƒe ɣletinyigba dzi vevie. Nukawoe nèsusu be nu vevi siwo gbɔ yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ tsona, eye nukawoe wòate ŋu akpɔ ɖe nutome dzi?
Nuƒle le Internet dzi va le bɔbɔm ɖe edzi le ƒe siawo me. Nukawo gbɔe nɔnɔme sia tso, eye ŋusẽ kae wòkpɔna ɖe nutoa me dɔwɔƒewo dzi?
Le xexeame ƒe akpa geɖe la, amesiwo xlẽa agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ŋutɔ. Nukawo gbɔe wòtso be nu sia le to yim, eye nukawoe nye emetsonuwo na hadomegbenɔnɔ?
Amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ fũ va le dzi tsim vevie le dugã geɖe me. Nukawoe hea amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ fũ vɛ, eye nukawoe wògblẽna le dugã me agbenɔnɔ ŋu?
Xexeame katã ƒe nuwo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ he viɖe geɖe vɛ, gake ekpɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe akpa aɖewo hã dzi. Nukawo gbɔe xexeame katã ƒe nuwo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ tso, eye aleke wòkpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe xexeame dzii?
Le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me la, adzɔge ʋĩ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ va bɔ. Dzro viɖe kple kuxi siwo le adzɔge dɔwɔwɔ me.
Ame geɖe wu le ʋuʋum tso kɔƒenutowo me yina dugãwo me. Dzro viɖe kple kuxi siwo le nɔnɔme sia ŋu me.
Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe ŋgɔyiyiwo trɔ alesi amewo ɖoa dzee. Viɖe kple kuxi kawoe le ŋgɔyiyi sia ŋu?
Du geɖe le ga dem dutoƒoʋuɖoɖo ƒe ɖoɖowo me be woatsɔ aɖe ʋuwo ƒe tsɔtsɔ dzi akpɔtɔ. Dzro viɖe kple kuxi siwo le gadede asi sia ŋu me.
Dukɔwo dome mɔzɔzɔ ƒe anyinɔnɔ dzi ɖe edzi ŋutɔ. Dzro viɖe kple kuxi siwo le tsaɖilawo kple dukɔ siwo xɔa amedzrowo ŋu me.

Le dukɔ aɖewo me la, ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo ƒe akpa si wowɔna le tɔtrɔm, evɔ le bubuwo me la, akpa siwo wowɔna tso blema ke la gakpɔtɔ li. Èlɔ̃ ɖe edzi be ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo ƒe akpa siwo wowɔna le tɔtrɔma? Ŋusẽ kae esia le kpɔkpɔm ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ dzi?
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be dzilawo ɖeɖeko ƒe agbanɔamedzie wònye be woahe ɖeviwo, evɔ ame bubuwo ya susui be ele be dziɖuɖua nawɔ akpa aɖe. Dzro nukpɔsusu evea siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kpɔa ŋusẽ nyui ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ dzi, gake ame bubuwo ya susui be ekpɔa ŋusẽ gbegblẽ ɖe amewo dzi. Dzro nukpɔsusu eveawo siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Xexeame katã ƒe nuwo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ le dekɔnuwo ƒe dzesidenu si bu la hem vɛ. Afikae nèlɔ̃ ɖe edzi alo mèlɔ̃ ɖe edzi o? Afɔ kawoe woate ŋu awɔ atsɔ akpɔ nutoa me dekɔnuwo ta?
Ame aɖewo xɔe se be aɖaŋudɔwo nye hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe akpa vevi aɖe, evɔ ame bubuwo ya susui be enye atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo. Dzro nukpɔsusu evea siaa me eye nàgblɔ wò susu.
Ðe ŋdi me ɖoɖowɔɖi si woawɔ le etsɔme si me wowɔa nusianu le wo ɖokui si eye wowɔa eŋudɔ nyuie wu be wòawɔ dɔ nyuie wu la me. Kuxi kawoe doa mo ɖa le vome?
Tsɔe be ŋusẽ gã aɖe le asiwò si ana nàte ŋu atɔ vie aɖabaƒoƒo 10 gaƒoƒo ɖesiaɖe. Aleke nètsɔa esia dea wò gbesiagbedɔwo me?
Ŋlɔ nu tso ŋkeke aɖe si le ame si wɔa ɖoɖo fũu akpa si wɔa ɖoɖo ɖe woƒe ŋkekea ƒe aɖabaƒoƒo ɖesiaɖe ŋu la ƒe agbe ŋu. Nukae dzɔna ne nuwo dze egɔme nɔ zɔzɔm le ɣeyiɣi si woɖo ɖi na wo dzi?
To nusiwo wòle be woawɔ ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo ƒe ɖoɖo si me nutovɛ kple esi mebɔ o vɛ si trɔa gbesiagbedɔwo wozua fefe. Se kawoe nye seawo, eye aleke woʋãa wò?
Wɔ ŋutinya aɖe tso ame aɖe si le agbagba dzem be yeaɖe asi le numame gbegblẽ aɖe si bɔ (abe heheɖemegbe alo numeɖenuwo ɖuɖu fũ ene) ŋu to mɔnu siwo mebɔ o alo akunyawɔwɔ zazã me.
Bu ɔfis aɖe si me dɔwɔla ɖesiaɖe tsi tre ɖi na seselelãme vovovo (le kpɔɖeŋu me, dzidzɔ, dziku, ŋuʋaʋã) ŋu kpɔ. Aleke wowɔa gbesiagbedɔwo kple kpekpewoe?
Ƒo nu tso adzɔge dɔwɔwɔ ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe ŋu, gake le esi teƒe be amea nawɔ dɔ tso aƒeme la, ele dɔ wɔm tso teƒe wɔnuku vovovowo (abe ƒukpo siwo le tsia dzi alo ave siwo me afakaka le ene).
Ŋlɔ nu tso AI ame ŋutɔ ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si dzea dɔwo gɔmeɖeɖe gɔme le nutovɛ me eye wòwɔa afɔɖeɖe siwo kpena ɖe ame ŋu eye womate ŋu agblɔe ɖi o hã ŋu.
Le akunyawɔƒe aɖe la, dɔwɔlawo zãa atikewo tsɔ doa woƒe dɔwɔwɔ ɖe ŋgɔe hena dɔ vovovowo wɔwɔ. Nukae dzɔna ne ame aɖe no atike si mesɔ o hena dɔ gbegblẽ wɔwɔ?

Dɔdamɔnu yeye aɖe gblɔ be yewonɔa te ɖe ame ɖeka ƒe numamewo kple nusiwo wòlɔ̃ dzi wɔa ‘dɔwɔŋkeke deblibo’ la ƒe kpɔɖeŋu. Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe si te ekpɔ, gake wòva kpɔe be esẽ wu alesi wokpɔ mɔe sãsãsã.
Kpɔe ɖa le susu me be èle aƒe si ate ŋu akɔ eɖokui ŋu gake wòatu eya ŋutɔ ƒe ‘nukpɔsusuwo’ ɖo le alesi wòle be dzadzɛnyenye nanɔ ŋu. Kuxi kawoe doa mo ɖa?
Ðe aƒemedɔwo ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe si me wotrɔa aƒemedɔ ɖesiaɖe wòzua fefe sue aɖe, si me dzidzenuwo, teƒeɖoɖowo, kple kuxi siwo womele mɔ kpɔm na o le bliboe la me.
Ŋlɔ nu tso aƒe aɖe si me mɔ̃awo katã ate ŋu aƒo nu le ŋu. Wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe ƒe amenyenye to vovo eye woɖoa aɖaŋu (alo nyatoƒoetoto) esime nèle wò gbesiagbedɔwo wɔm.
To gbesiagbe dzadzɛnyenye ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe vɛ le xexe si me gbesiagbe hea akunyawɔwɔ ƒe mɔxenu vovovo vɛ, abe ke si wotsɔ afakaka wɔe alo dzadzɛnyenyedɔwɔnu vɔ̃ɖiwo ene.
Ɣesiaɣi si nèle nu klɔm la, afɔkpa aɖe buna, gake le esi teƒe be wòabu la, ezɔa mɔ to ɣeyiɣiwo me. Ŋlɔ nu tso nusiwo ŋu esia kplɔa ame yia ŋu.
Wò kamedede ŋuti mɔ̃a dzea aɖaŋuɖoɖo siwo sɔ na wò, siwo nye susuŋutinunya kloe, nana gɔme. Aleke wòtrɔa wò ɖoɖowɔɖi, eye nukae nye eƒe ɖoɖowɔɖi ɣaɣla?
Tsɔe be ɣesiaɣi si nèle kame dem la, wotsɔa wò yia nu ŋutɔŋutɔ bubu aɖe si me wò ŋutilã ƒe ŋusẽ kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe xexe si ƒo xlã wò dzi le. Ƒo nu tso kamedede ƒe ɣeyiɣi ɖeka ŋu.
Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe si wɔ nubabla kple akunyawɔla aɖe be wòalé woƒe lãmesẽ taɖodzinuwo me ɖe asi ŋu. Gbesiagbe si wodzo le dɔ aɖe dzi la, wodzea ŋgɔ emetsonu si mebɔ o gake mebɔ o.
Wɔ ŋutinya aɖe si me gbesiagbe nuɖuɖu dzadzraɖo trɔna zua nuɖaɖa ƒe mɔzɔzɔ—nu ɖesiaɖe tso akunyawɔwɔnyigba dzi eye wòhiã be woawɔ nu ɖe eŋu etɔxɛe.
Ƒo nu tso gbesiagbe mɔzɔzɔ le susumedu si me akunyawɔlawo yɔ fũu me, afisi dutoƒoʋuwo lɔ tasiaɖam siwo wotsɔ afakaka wɔe, nuwɔwɔ siwo dzona, alo agbowo ɖe eme.
Le du si me etsɔme le me la, tomemɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa nye nusi trɔna ɣesiaɣi. Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe ƒe mɔzɔzɔ edziedzi to ɖoɖo sia si womate ŋu agblɔ ɖi o dzi ŋu.
Ɣesiaɣi si nèɖo bɔs yi dɔme la, èkpɔa mɔzɔzɔ ma ke ƒe tɔtrɔ bubu le xexeame katã si sɔ kple wo nɔewo me. Kpɔɖeŋu alo tɔtrɔ kawoe nèdzea egɔme dea dzesii?
Ŋlɔ nu tso dzeɖoɖo siwo mebɔ o gake wole kpuie siwo yia edzi le dutoƒoʋuwo me le mɔzɔla siwo tso agbe ƒe akpa vovovowo kura dome ŋu.
Teleportation nye ʋuɖoɖo si bɔ wu, gake kuxi aɖe nana mɔzɔlawo tsia teƒe vovovowo hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe. Ðe alesi amewo kpɔa gbesiagbe fuɖename sia gbɔe.
Bu nuɖuɖudzraƒe aɖe si me wodzraa nu le le etsɔme si me robot siwo zãa AI kpena ɖe nuƒlelawo ŋu le, gake woawo ŋutɔ ƒe susu le wo si ŋu kpɔ. Aleke esia kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe nuƒleƒe ƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ dzii?
Trɔ ŋkeke dzro aɖe si me nèƒua du le dɔdasiwo wɔwɔ me wòazu didi vevi aɖe, eye ʋutɔɖoƒe ɖesiaɖe nanye kuxi tɔxɛ aɖe (le kpɔɖeŋu me, nusiwo mebɔ o xɔxɔ, nyabiasewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ, kple bubuawo).
Wotsɔa nuɖuɖu siwo nàƒle ƒe xexlẽdzesi si me nu siwo dze abe ɖe womeli o ene la naa wò. Ne èle didim la, àkpɔe be nu ɖesiaɖe nye kpeɖodzi si kplɔa ame yia nane si lolo wu sã gbɔ.
Le mɔ̃ɖaŋununya deŋgɔ ƒe xexe si me wowɔa ɖiɖiɖeme nyuie wu le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya nu me la, tsɔ dɔwɔnu kple mɔnu siwo woatsɔ awɔ dɔe le etsɔme ɖɔ ame ƒe zã ƒe yaƒoƒo ƒe ɖoɖo.
Le xexe si me woate ŋu aɖu drɔ̃ewo dzi to ɖoɖowɔɖi tɔxɛwo dzi wɔwɔ me la, ɖɔ alesi ame dzrana ɖo ɖe eƒe drɔ̃e deblibo ŋu.
Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe si dea ŋugble le teƒe siwo mebɔ o wu (le kpɔɖeŋu me, le dziƒoxɔ kɔkɔ aɖe tame, le atsiaƒu te, le ave gã aɖe me) be wòatsɔ aɖo titina le ŋkeke didi aɖe megbe ŋu.
Ƒo nu tso fiẽsi aɖe si nèzãna edziedzi kple aƒemelã akunyawɔla aɖe si si ŋutete le be wòatrɔ eƒe nɔnɔme wòasɔ ɖe aƒetɔa ƒe seselelãme nu ŋu.
To agbalẽŋɔŋlɔ ƒe mɔnu tɔxɛ aɖe vɛ be woatsɔ ade ŋugble le ŋkekea me nudzɔdzɔwo ŋu, nàzã nya siwo ƒonɛ ɖe ame nu siwo léa ŋku ɖe akpedada, nutovɛ, alo ameɖokui didi ƒe ɣeyiɣi suewo ŋu.
Ƒo nu tso ame aɖe si mate ŋu aku o gake wòsea veve sue ɖesiaɖe le woƒe abi siwo woxɔ ta la ŋu. Aleke wowɔna nɔa te ɖe anyinɔnɔ sia nu?
Bu ame aɖe si si aƒemelã si nye robot si si AI deŋgɔ le si dze eya ŋutɔ ƒe amenyenye kple didiwo tutuɖo gɔme ŋu kpɔ.
Wowɔa takpekpe aɖe le lã ƒomevi vovovo siwo nye amedzrowo dome be woawɔ ŋutifafanubabla si woawɔ le xexeame katã. Aleke wowɔna ɖua gbegbɔgblɔ kple dekɔnuwo ƒe mɔxenuwo dzi?
Ŋlɔ nu tso ɣletinyigba aɖe si ŋu lã ƒomevi deŋgɔ aɖe trɔ asi le gake wogblẽe ɖi ŋu. Nukae ame yeyeawo ke ɖo tso eƒe tameɖoɖo vavãtɔ ŋu?
Le xexe si me woate ŋu afi ŋkuɖodzinuwo le me la, ƒo nu tso ŋkuɖodzinufiala aɖe si dzea woawo ŋutɔ ƒe amenyenye manyamanya gɔme la ƒe agbenɔnɔ ŋu.

Anyigbayeyedilawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe to mɔ̃ɖaŋununya vɛ be woatsɔ ati kpo le didimewo dome, gake didime ɖesiaɖe me afɔku le wu mamlɛtɔ le mɔ si menya kpɔna dzea sii bɔbɔe o nu. Nukae nana woyia edzi yia edzi?
Le etsɔ si gbɔna kpuie me la, yamenutomeyimɔ̃ ƒe dekɔnu siwo woŋlɔ be ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia ƒe gbeɖuɖɔwo ayɔ yamenutome. Ƒo nu tso gbeɖuɖɔdzrala aɖe ƒe agbenɔnɔ le glikpo siawo dome ŋu.
Ʋɔtru ɣaɣla aɖe do le avea me si kplɔa ame yia fae-fiaɖuƒea me. Nukae mɔzɔla gbãtɔwo kpɔna le akpa kemɛ?
Ʋɔ dribawo tsrɔ̃ tso gbaɖegbe ke, gake wogadzi ɖeka ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe ŋutilã me. Aleke esia kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe akunyawɔwɔ ƒe xexeame dzii?
Ŋlɔ nu tso ame aɖe si de asi nubabla te kple afakala sesẽ aɖe le manyamanya me eye fifia ele be wòawɔ dɔ aɖe si mate ŋu adzɔ o kloe la ŋu.
Ƒo nu tso du aɖe si me xɔ ɖesiaɖe kple ablɔ ɖesiaɖe le agbe le, si me eya ŋutɔ ƒe tamesusuwo kple seselelãmewo le la ŋu. Aleke afima nɔlawo nɔa agbe ɖekae kple woƒe aƒe siwo me wole?
Woƒo fi de fiavi alo fiavinyɔnu be wòatrɔ azu lã zã sia zã. Ele be woadi mɔ aɖe si dzi woato aɖe fiƒodea ɖa hafi wòaɖu wo.
Ame dzea eƒe drɔ̃e baɖawo kpɔkpɔ gɔme le agbe ŋutɔŋutɔ me. Ɣesiaɣi si wonyɔ la, drɔ̃e baɖawo ƒe xexea ƒe akpa bubu kplɔa wo ɖo va zua nu ŋutɔŋutɔ.
Ŋlɔ nu tso mɔ̃ɖaŋununya aɖe (telefon, kɔmpiuta, kple bubuawo) si va zu nusi me ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖe zua gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo le ŋu. Aleke wòtrɔa asi le etɔ ŋui?
output: How many watts is my microwave?

input: Le du sue aɖe me la, ɣea nu yina zi ɖeka eye zãtitina dona ɣesiaɣi. Ame aɖeke mate ŋu adzo le dua me o, eye nuwɔwɔ wɔnukuwo dzea dodo gɔme tso viviti me.
Xɔlɔ̃wo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe kli agbalẽ xoxo aɖe si ƒo nu tso kɔnu aɖe si wowɔna tsɔ yɔa mawu aɖe si woŋlɔ be la ŋu. Wowɔa esia abe fefenya ene—vaseɖe esime wòwɔa dɔ.
Puppetwɔla wɔa fefenuvi siwo le abe agbe ene, gake le eƒe bu manyatalenu megbe la, fefenuviawo dzea nuwɔwɔ gɔme abe ɖe wole agbe ene, eye wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe kple tameɖoɖo vɔ̃ɖiwo.
Anyigbayeyedilawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ke ɖe dekɔnu ɣaɣla aɖe si ŋu gotagome xexeame mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo o ƒe alafa geɖe la ŋu. Aleke wowɔa nu kple habɔbɔ siae?
Ƒo nu tso mɔzɔzɔ aɖe si wozɔ yi atsiaƒua ƒe akpa si goglo wu, afisi wokpɔ nane si womenɔ mɔ kpɔm na o—si nye blemadu aɖe si ŋu nuwɔwɔ siwo womenya o dzɔna le.
Le dzogbe si dzi ke ƒe ahom sesẽwo kple nuwɔwɔ ɣaɣlawo yɔ fũ me la, afɔkudzidelawo ʋlia ho le ƒe sia ƒe ƒe duɖimekeke me hena fetu si mebɔ o.
Ʋua me dɔwɔla aɖe tsi ƒukpo ɣaɣla aɖe si trɔa eƒe nɔnɔme ɣesiaɣi eye wòɣlaa blema nya ɣaɣlawo la dzi.
Dziŋgɔli me ƒudzidzodalawo ƒe ha aɖe kplɔa yameʋuwo to ƒukpo siwo le tsia dzi kple dziƒoduwo dzi hele kesinɔnu aɖe si ŋu nya wogblɔna le xotutu me si woɣla ɖe alilikpowo me dim.
Nyagɔmekula aɖe nyɔ eye meɖo ŋku gaƒoƒo 48 mamlɛawo dzi o, gake eva kpɔe be yewoe nye ame vevitɔ si ŋu wobu fɔe le nuvlowɔwɔ gã aɖe me. Aleke wowɔna ɖoa kpe woƒe fɔmaɖimaɖi dzi?
Amedzrodzeƒe aɖe dzena le mɔ manyatalenu aɖe nu le teƒe vovovowo le xexeame godoo, gake zã me koe wòdzena. Ne ŋdi nya ɖo ko la, ebuna. Nukae nye eƒe nya ɣaɣla?
Le nutatawo ƒe xɔ xɔŋkɔ aɖe me la, wodzea nya ɣaɣlawo gbɔgblɔ tso ame siwo kpɔa wo ŋu. Nukae le megbe na nudzɔdzɔ wɔnuku sia?
Amedzro aɖe si do motsyɔnu la yia edzi dzena le nuvlowɔƒe vovovowo gake edze abe kadodo aɖeke mele eŋu kple nuvlowɔwɔa gbeɖe o ene. Amekawoe wonye, eye nukae wonya?
Bu ŋutinya bubu aɖe si me Leonardo da Vinci wu ɣeyiɣi ƒe mɔ̃ aɖe si le dɔ wɔm nu ŋu kpɔ. Nukae adzɔ ne wova ke ɖe eŋu le egbeŋkekeawo me?
Ŋlɔ nu tso nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe si le nu ƒom tso ŋutinya me nudzɔdzɔ gã aɖe ŋu si tsɔ nyatakaka ɖeka trɔ eƒe emetsonu le vo me ŋu.
Ƒo nu tso tsitretsiɖeŋuha aɖe ƒe ŋutinya le ameteteɖeanyidziɖuɖu aɖe me le ŋutinya me, kple agbenyuinɔnɔ ƒe kuxi sesẽ siwo wodoa goe be woatsi agbe.
Wɔ magazine me nya aɖe tso ŋutinya me tsaɖila xɔŋkɔ aɖe si kli nu le anyigba si meli le anyigbatata aɖeke dzi o la gbɔ.
Wogake ɖe fiaɖuƒe aɖe si wosusu be ebu le ŋutinya me ŋu ake, gake eƒe amewo metsi o ƒe alafa geɖe. Nukae dzɔ ɖe wo dzi?
Le etsɔ si gbɔna kpuie me la, woate ŋu atsɔ susu ayi ŋutilã vovovowo me. Nukae dzɔna ne ame aɖe trɔ yi ŋutilã si wowɔ kple asi me eye wòdi be yeatrɔ ayi yeƒe nɔnɔme gbãtɔ me?
Ŋlɔ ŋutinya aɖe tso hadomegbenɔnɔ si me mɔ̃ aɖee ɖoa ame ƒe agbenyuinɔnɔ ƒe asixɔxɔ ŋu. Nukae dzɔna ne ame aɖe si ƒe agbenyuinɔnɔ ƒe dzeside mede o tsɔ nya ɖe ɖoɖoa ŋu?
Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe va kpɔe be drɔ̃ewo nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo sɔ kple wo nɔewo ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe wo ŋu vie. Aleke esia trɔa míaƒe gɔmesese le susu ŋui?
Le agbenɔnɔ le ku megbe la, wonɔa te ɖe dɔmenyonyo ƒe ŋkuɖodzinya siwo wogblẽ ɖi dzi drɔ̃a ʋɔnu luʋɔwo. Ame aɖe ƒe nɔnɔme kpɔe be ga le vɔvɔm na yewo.
Le etsɔme si dzi AI akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo me la, nyametsotso mamlɛtɔ si woɖe mɔ na amegbetɔwo be woawɔe nye ŋkuɖodzinu si wodi be yewoakpɔ ta na tegbee.
Ŋlɔ ŋutinya aɖe tso kalẽtɔ gã siwo xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si do tso dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme me hena dɔdasi mamlɛtɔ ɖeka ŋu.
Ƒo nu tso ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe mɔzɔla aɖe si ge ɖe xexeame katã si sɔ kple wo nɔewo si me ŋutinya me nudzɔdzɔwo trɔ kura le le vo me la ƒe afɔkuwo ŋu.
Bu fiaɖuƒe aɖe si me seselelãmewo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe yame ƒe nɔnɔme dzi le ŋu kpɔ. Ƒo nu tso ŋkeke aɖe si dzɔ le dukɔmevi aɖe si le afima ƒe agbe me ŋu.
Wɔ ŋutinya aɖe si ƒo xlã blemanu aɖe si ne woka asi eŋu la, wòana eléla la akpɔ woƒe etsɔme vie, gake sɛkɛnd 10 koe.
Ŋlɔ ŋutinya kpui aɖe tso yamenutomeyimɔ̃ si sea nu gɔme si di vevie be yeakpɔ zɔhɛ gake wòtsi ɣletinyigba si dzi ame aɖeke mele o dzi la ƒe nukpɔsusu nu.
Ŋlɔ dzeɖoɖo aɖe le nyagɔmekula aɖe kple nuvlowɔla aɖe si ƒe susu me le si nye ɖevimexɔlɔ̃wo le adzame dome.
Na dzeɖoɖo nanɔ yamenutomeyimɔ̃dzikpɔla kple amedzro si zãa amadedewo tsɔ ɖoa dze ɖe nyawo teƒe dome.
Ŋlɔ dzeɖoɖo aɖe le ame gbagbe kple gbɔgbɔ si ɖoa agbe ŋuti aɖaŋuɖoɖo siwo mèle mɔ kpɔm na o dome.
Wɔ dzeɖoɖo aɖe le AI kple ewɔla dome, afisi AI la kea ɖi taɖodzinu si le eƒe anyinɔnɔ ŋu le.
Ŋlɔ dzeɖoɖo aɖe le fiasã me tɔ eve siwo ɖo nugbe be yewoamu fia lɔlɔ̃a aɖe ɖa, gake wotsɔe trɔ asi le eŋu be ɖoɖowɔɖi ɣaɣla aɖe le wo dometɔ ɖeka si.
Ƒo nu tso xexe aɖe si me dekɔnuwo le ƒukpo siwo le tsia dzi le yame, eye wotsɔa nunɔamesiwo toa ʋuƒo gãwo ƒe kadodo aɖe me.
Kpɔ du gã aɖe si keke ta le anyigba te si ŋu numiemie siwo me keklẽŋusẽ le tsɔ wɔa ŋusẽe ŋu kpɔ. Kuxi kawoe emenɔlawo doa goe?
Kpɔ hadomegbenɔnɔ si me akunyawɔwɔ kple mɔ̃ɖaŋununya awɔ ɖeka le mɔ si me kuxi aɖeke mele o nu le susu me. Aleke amewo zãa ŋusẽ siawo le woƒe gbesiagbegbenɔnɔ me?
Wɔ xexe aɖe si me tsidzɔƒe ɖeka kolia si me tsidzɔƒe ɖeka kolia le koe nye oasis ɣaɣla aɖe si ʋãna ɣleti sia ɣleti, si hea afima nɔlawo katã ƒe ʋuʋu ɣesiaɣi.
Ðe xexe aɖe si nɔ anyi le tsɔtsrɔ̃ megbe si gbugbɔ tu eɖokui wòzu utopia, gake nya ɣaɣla siwo le ete siwo do ŋɔdzi na eƒe ŋutifafa le eme la me.
Ŋlɔ hakpanya aɖe si me wowɔa ɣeyiɣi ɖesiaɖe ƒe amenyenye le eye woƒoa wo ɖokui ɖe dzeɖoɖo me tso agbe ƒe tsatsam ŋu.
Wɔ haiku siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe tsi tre ɖi na lɔlɔ̃ aɖe si woŋlɔ be ƒe ŋkuɖodzinya kakɛkakɛ aɖe.
Kpa hakpanya aɖe si akplɔ nuxlẽla to drɔ̃e siwo me susu mele o siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo me, atsɔ nu ŋutɔŋutɔ kple susumenuwo atsaka.
Ŋlɔ hakpanya aɖe si lé du si me amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe didime kple gbeɖiɖiwo ɖe te abe ɖe wònye saŋkuƒoƒo ene.
Kpɔe ɖa le susu me be dzɔdzɔme le ha dzim na anyigba hafi zã naɖo. Nya kple nɔnɔmetata kawoe wòazã?
Ke ne amadede siwo katã le xexeame te bubu ɖekaɖeka ya ɖe? Ðe nusi dzɔna ne amadede ɖeka koe susɔ.
Wɔ ŋutinya aɖe tso agbalẽdzraɖoƒe aɖe si me agbalẽ ɖesiaɖe si woŋlɔ kpɔ kple agbalẽ ɖesiaɖe si woate ŋu aŋlɔ kpɔ le.
Bu xexe aɖe si me wotsɔa seselelãmewo dea aŋetu me hedzranae ŋu kpɔ. Aleke esia atrɔ amegbetɔwo ƒe kadodo kple hadomegbenɔnɔe?
Ke ne amewo dze tsitsi gɔme ɖe megbe, eye wova nɔ ɖekakpuiwo kpɔm esime wole agbe didi ya ɖe? Aleke esia akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe woƒe ƒomedodowo kple ɣeyiɣi ƒe nukpɔsusu dzii?
